---
title: "Exploring Storms"
author: "Avinesh Saravana"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tidyverse))
```

## Named Storms Per Year

This plot shows the total number of unique named storms recorded each year in the NOAA Atlantic hurricane database (`dplyr::storms` dataset).

```{r}
#| label: plot-storms
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 5
#| message: false
#| warning: false

# Calculate the number of distinct named storms per year
storms_count <- storms %>%
  distinct(year, name) %>%
  count(year, name = "num_storms")

# Plot using ggplot2
ggplot(storms_count, aes(x = year, y = num_storms)) +
  geom_line(color = "#1f77b4", size = 1.2) +
  geom_point(color = "#0f3c5e", size = 2.5) +
  labs(
    title = "Annual Count of Named Atlantic Storms",
    subtitle = "Tracking unique storms per year (1975 - present)",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of Named Storms"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 18, color = "#2c3e50"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, color = "#7f8c8d", margin = margin(b = 15)),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```
